2607.03118.title: Vidu S1: A Real-Time Interactive Video Generation Model
2607.03118.abstract: We introduce Vidu S1, a real-time interactive video generation model supporting voice control of digital characters. Users can control video generation content at any moment through voice instructions. Vidu S1 supports infinite-length real-time video generation without blurring, drift, or visual distortion. Built with TurboDiffusion and TurboServe, Vidu S1 outputs 540p real-time videos at up to 42 FPS on regular consumer GPUs. Users can upload custom images of real people, anime, and pets, and choose different voice tones for personalized experiences. Experiments show that Vidu S1 achieves the best performance across all test metrics while fully meeting real-time inference requirements. A playable online demo is available atthis https URL.
2607.03118.abstract_zh: 本文介绍Vidu S1，一款支持语音控制数字角色的实时交互式视频生成模型。用户可通过语音指令随时控制视频生成内容。该模型支持无模糊、无偏移、无视觉失真的无限长度实时视频生成。基于TurboDiffusion与TurboServe架构构建，Vidu S1在常规消费级GPU上可实现最高42帧/秒的540p实时视频输出。用户可上传真人、动漫角色及宠物的自定义图像，并选择不同音色以实现个性化体验。实验表明，Vidu S1在所有测试指标上均取得最佳性能，同时完全满足实时推理需求。可交互的在线演示版本可通过此链接访问：https URL。

2601.16211.title: Why Can't I Open My Drawer? Mitigating Object-Driven Shortcuts in Zero-Shot Compositional Action Recognition
2601.16211.abstract: Zero-Shot Compositional Action Recognition (ZS-CAR) requires recognizing novel verb-object combinations composed of previously observed primitives. In this work, we tackle a key failure mode: models predict verbs via object-driven shortcuts (i.e., relying on the labeled object class) rather than temporal evidence. We argue that sparse compositional supervision and verb-object learning asymmetry can promote object-driven shortcut learning. Our analysis with proposed diagnostic metrics shows that existing methods overfit to training co-occurrence patterns and underuse temporal verb cues, resulting in weak generalization to unseen compositions. To address object-driven shortcuts, we propose Robust COmpositional REpresentations (RCORE) with two components. Co-occurrence Prior Regularization (CPR) adds explicit supervision for unseen compositions and regularizes the model against frequent co-occurrence priors by treating them as hard negatives. Temporal Order Regularization for Composition (TORC) enforces temporal-order sensitivity to learn temporally grounded verb representations. Across Sth-com and EK100-com, RCORE reduces shortcut diagnostics and consequently improves compositional generalization.
2601.16211.abstract_zh: 零样本组合动作识别(Zero-Shot Compositional Action Recognition, ZS-CAR)要求识别由已观察到的基元组合而成的新颖动词-宾语组合。本研究针对一个关键失效模式：模型通过宾语驱动捷径（即依赖已标注的宾语类别）而非时序证据来预测动词。我们认为稀疏的组合监督与动词-宾语学习的不对称性会助长宾语驱动捷径学习。通过提出的诊断指标分析表明，现有方法过度拟合训练数据的共现模式，未能充分利用动词的时序线索，导致对未见组合的泛化能力薄弱。为应对宾语驱动捷径问题，我们提出具有双重组件的鲁棒组合表征框架(Robust COmpositional REpresentations, RCORE)。共现先验正则化(Co-occurrence Prior Regularization, CPR)为未见组合添加显式监督，并通过将高频共现模式作为困难负样本对模型进行正则化。组合时序顺序正则化(Temporal Order Regularization for Composition, TORC)强制模型学习对时序顺序敏感的、基于时序基础的表征。在Sth-com和EK100-com数据集上的实验表明，RCORE有效降低了捷径诊断指标，从而显著提升了组合泛化性能。

2603.29616.title: Video-Oasis: Rethinking Evaluation of Video Understanding
2603.29616.abstract: The inherent complexity of video understanding makes it difficult to determine whether Video-LLM benchmark performance stems from visual perception, linguistic reasoning, or knowledge priors. While many benchmarks have emerged to assess high-level reasoning, shared criteria for evaluating video understanding remain largely overlooked. Instead of introducing yet another benchmark, we take a step back to re-examine the criteria for evaluating video understanding. In this work, we introduce Video-Oasis, a sustainable diagnostic suite for systematically auditing existing video understanding benchmarks. This audit reveals that 55\% of existing benchmark samples are solvable without visual input or temporal context. After filtering these shortcuts, the remaining video-native challenges expose a substantial capability gap: state-of-the-art models perform only marginally above random guessing. Building on these findings, we use the distilled challenges as a testbed to investigate which algorithmic design choices contribute to robust video understanding. We hope our work provides a practical foundation for constructing rigorous video benchmarks and evaluating future Video-LLMs. Code is available atthis https URL.
2603.29616.abstract_zh: 视频理解固有的复杂性使得难以判断Video-LLM基准测试的表现究竟源于视觉感知、语言推理还是知识先验。虽然当前已涌现出许多评估高级推理能力的基准测试，但衡量视频理解的共同标准却长期被忽视。相较于提出又一个新的基准，本研究选择退后一步，重新审视评估视频理解的标准体系。本文提出Video-Oasis——一个可持续的诊断套件，用于系统审计现有视频理解基准。审计结果表明，现有基准样本中55%的内容无需视觉输入或时序上下文即可求解。在过滤这些捷径样本后，剩余的视频原生挑战暴露出显著的能力差距：最先进模型的表现仅略高于随机猜测水平。基于这些发现，我们利用提炼出的挑战集作为试验平台，探究哪些算法设计选择有助于实现稳健的视频理解。本研究期望为构建严谨的视频基准测试和评估未来视频大语言模型提供实用基础。代码可通过此链接获取：https://[URL]

2607.08768.title: UniClawBench: A Universal Benchmark for Proactive Agents on Real-World Tasks
2607.08768.abstract: The rapid development of large language models and multimodal large language models has accelerated the emergence of proactive agents capable of operating everyday tools and assisting users in real-world environments. However, existing benchmarks struggle to evaluate such agents effectively, as they often rely on sandboxed environments and single-turn evaluation paradigms. Moreover, their scenario-based task taxonomies mix multiple model capabilities within the same task category, making it difficult to identify the root causes of agent failures. To address these limitations, we introduce UniClawBench, the first capability-driven benchmark designed to evaluate proactive agents in dynamic, real-world settings. UniClawBench is built around five foundational model capabilities: Skill Usage, Exploration, Long-Context Reasoning, Multimodal Understanding, and Cross-Platform Coordination. Based on these capabilities, we design 400 bilingual real-world tasks. Unlike previous benchmarks that rely on static, pre-recorded answers, our benchmark evaluates agents in live Docker containers using fine-grained, step-by-step completion checkpoints. Furthermore, we design a closed-loop evaluation strategy comprising an executor agent, a hidden supervisor agent, and a user agent to simulate realistic multi-turn human feedback without leaking grading criteria. To disentangle base model capabilities from framework-level design choices, we evaluate state-of-the-art models under multiple agent frameworks. Through comprehensive comparisons across both models and frameworks, we show how base model capabilities and agent framework designs jointly shape performance in real-world environments. To facilitate future research, we make our benchmark and code publicly available atthis https URL.
2607.08768.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型与多模态大语言模型的快速发展，加速了能够操作日常工具并在真实环境中协助用户的主动式智能体（proactive agents）的出现。然而，现有基准测试（benchmarks）难以有效评估此类智能体，因为它们通常依赖于沙盒环境与单轮次评估范式。此外，其基于场景的任务分类体系往往在同一任务类别中混合了模型的多种能力，导致难以定位智能体失败的根本原因。为应对这些局限，我们提出了UniClawBench——首个能力驱动的基准测试，旨在动态、真实的环境中评估主动式智能体。UniClawBench围绕五大基础模型能力构建：技能使用（Skill Usage）、探索（Exploration）、长上下文推理（Long-Context Reasoning）、多模态理解（Multimodal Understanding）以及跨平台协调（Cross-Platform Coordination）。基于这些能力，我们设计了400项双语真实世界任务。与以往依赖静态预录制答案的基准不同，本基准通过在实时Docker容器中使用细粒度、分步骤的完成检查点来评估智能体。此外，我们设计了包含执行智能体、隐藏监督智能体与用户智能体的闭环评估策略，以模拟真实的多轮次人类反馈，同时避免评分标准泄露。为区分基础模型能力与框架层面的设计选择，我们在多种智能体框架下对前沿模型进行了评估。通过对模型与框架的全面比较，我们揭示了基础模型能力与智能体框架设计如何共同影响其在真实环境中的表现。为促进未来研究，我们已将基准测试与代码公开于此https URL。

2607.08758.title: Ideas Have Genomes: Benchmarking Scientific Lineage Reasoning and Lineage-Grounded Idea Generation
2607.08758.abstract: Scientific ideas rarely start from a blank page. They inherit mechanisms, repair known limitations, and recombine pieces of earlier work, much like biological genomes. Current benchmarks still say little about whether AI systems can follow this inheritance structure. We present IdeaGene-Bench (IG-Bench), a benchmark for scientific lineage reasoning and lineage-grounded idea generation. IG-Bench is organized around the IdeaGene framework: each paper or proposal is represented as a set of minimal, typed, evidence-grounded Idea Genome objects, and a GenomeDiff aligns these objects to record inheritance, mutation, loss, external import, and novel insertion under six operational evolutionary dynamics. The benchmark contains 1,961 golden lineage traces, 1,085 curated Idea Genome objects, and 920 pairwise GenomeDiff records across 10 scientific domains. It supports two evaluations. IG-Exam (42 task types, 1,029 instances) tests closed-form lineage reasoning across Idea Genome abstraction, inheritance tracing, evolutionary reasoning, and lineage verification. IG-Arena evaluates generation with a lineage-conditioned Population-Evolution Score(PES), asking whether a proposal can be inserted as a coherent descendant of a given lineage population: it should inherit the right Idea Genome objects, vary meaningfully from nearby work, and offer selection value for future research. Experiments on 14 LLM-based scientists expose a compositional bottleneck. The strongest system reaches only 27.3% exact accuracy on lineage reasoning, and structured lineage context reshuffles system rankings rather than helping every participant uniformly.
2607.08758.abstract_zh: 科学思想很少从零开始。它们继承既有机制、修正已知局限、重组先前工作的片段，这与生物基因组演化颇为相似。当前基准测试仍难以评估人工智能系统是否能遵循这种传承结构。我们提出IdeaGene-Bench（IG-Bench）——一个面向科学传承推理与传承锚定思想生成的基准测试框架。该基准围绕IdeaGene框架构建：每篇论文或研究提案被表征为一组最小化、类型化、证据支撑的Idea Genome（思想基因组）对象，而GenomeDiff（基因组差异）则通过六种操作性演化动态——继承、突变、缺失、外部引入与创新插入——对齐这些对象以记录传承关系。本基准包含1,961条黄金传承轨迹、1,085个精编Idea Genome对象及覆盖10个科学领域的920组成对GenomeDiff记录。它支持两类评估：IG-Exam（42种任务类型，1,029个实例）测试涵盖Idea Genome抽象化、传承溯源、演化推理与传承验证的封闭式传承推理能力；IG-Arena通过传承条件化群体演化评分（PES）评估生成质量，探究研究提案是否能作为给定传承群体的连贯后裔被嵌入——它应继承正确的Idea Genome对象、与邻近工作产生有意义的变异，并为未来研究提供选择价值。对14个基于大语言模型的科学智能系统的实验揭示了组合推理瓶颈：最优系统在传承推理任务上的精确匹配准确率仅为27.3%，且结构化传承语境会重塑系统排名而非均等提升所有参与者表现。

2607.08770.title: LongE2V: Long-Horizon Event-based Video Reconstruction, Prediction, and Frame Interpolation with Video Diffusion Models
2607.08770.abstract: Recovering high-quality video from sparse event streams is a challenging task. Regression methods often blur textures, while existing generative models struggle with long-term stability. We propose LongE2V, a novel approach that leverages pre-trained video diffusion priors to jointly handle event-based video reconstruction, prediction, and frame interpolation. By fine-tuning a foundational video model, our approach achieves high data efficiency and superior perceptual quality. We introduce Autoregressive Unrolling and Adaptive Context Switching to mitigate temporal drift in extremely long sequences. We also propose Reencoding Alignment with Cross Residual Correction to ensure precise bidirectional consistency during frame interpolation. Furthermore, Event Voxel Density Augmentation ensures robustness across varying sensor resolutions. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks demonstrate that LongE2V outperforms state-of-the-art methods across all three tasks, exhibiting exceptional temporal coherence and zero-shot generalization. Project page:this https URL
2607.08770.abstract_zh: 从稀疏事件流中恢复高质量视频是一项具有挑战性的任务。回归方法常导致纹理模糊，而现有生成模型则难以保持长期稳定性。我们提出LongE2V这一创新方法，通过利用预训练视频扩散先验，联合处理基于事件的视频重建、预测与帧插值任务。通过微调基础视频模型，我们的方法实现了高效的数据利用和卓越的感知质量。针对极长序列中的时序漂移问题，我们提出了自回归展开与自适应上下文切换机制。同时，通过重编码对齐与交叉残差校正技术，确保帧插值过程中精确的双向一致性。此外，事件体素密度增强策略保证了方法在不同传感器分辨率下的鲁棒性。在真实世界基准测试上的大量实验表明，LongE2V在全部三项任务中均超越现有最优方法，展现出卓越的时间连贯性和零样本泛化能力。项目页面：this https URL

2607.08765.title: Enhancing In-context Panoramic Generation via Geometric-aware Pretraining
2607.08765.abstract: In this work, we present Canvas360, a two-stage framework for in-context panoramic generation that combines geometry-aware pretraining with downstream task-specific fine-tuning. To address the lack of large-scale, high-quality training data tailored to in-context panoramic tasks, we propose Canvas360Dataset, a collection of 1M high-quality paired panoramic samples for style transfer, inpainting, outpainting, and editing, enabling effective supervision across diverse in-context generation scenarios. On the modeling side, Canvas360 enhances text-to-panorama generation through parallel depth generation, velocity circular padding, and similarity loss regularization, enabling the model to learn geometry-aware representations, capture object distortion details, and improve geometric consistency and global coherence. Furthermore, empowered by strong panoramic priors, Canvas360 enables a unified in-context panoramic generation framework that supports diverse downstream tasks via token-level concatenation, surpassing prior methods in both task coverage and modeling flexibility. Extensive experiments show that Canvas360 improves panoramic image fidelity, achieving particularly strong performance on the panorama-specific FAED metric and competitive or leading results across the reported quantitative evaluations. More information can be found on our project page:this https URL
2607.08765.abstract_zh: 本文提出Canvas360，一种面向上下文全景生成的两阶段框架，该框架将几何感知预训练与下游任务特定微调相结合。针对当前缺乏面向上下文全景任务的大规模高质量训练数据问题，我们构建了Canvas360Dataset——包含100万高质量配对全景样本的数据集，涵盖风格迁移、修复、扩展及编辑任务，从而为多样化的上下文生成场景提供有效监督。在建模层面，Canvas360通过并行深度生成、速度循环填充与相似度损失正则化三项创新，增强了文本到全景图像的生成能力：使模型能够学习几何感知表征、捕捉物体形变细节，并提升几何一致性与全局连贯性。此外，凭借强大的全景先验知识，Canvas360构建了统一的上下文全景生成框架，通过令牌级拼接支持多样化下游任务，在任务覆盖范围与建模灵活性方面均超越现有方法。大量实验表明，Canvas360显著提升了全景图像保真度，在全景专用指标FAED上表现尤为突出，并在所有报告的定量评估中取得竞争性或领先结果。更多信息请访问项目页面：此https URL

2607.03803.title: CineMobile: On-Device Image-to-Video Diffusion for Cinematic Camera Motion Generation
2607.03803.abstract: The growing demand for image-to-video creation on mobile devices has increasingly focused on cinematic motion effects like bullet time, dolly zoom, slow motion, etc. While Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) exhibit strong performance in video generation, their large parameter sizes and multi-step iterative denoising processes lead to substantial computational overhead, making efficient generation on mobile devices challenging. We propose CineMobile to bridge the gap. In particular, CineMobile adopts a three-fold optimization strategy: (1) leveraging a distillation-guided pruning approach to derive a compact yet efficient model that retains the essential video generation capabilities required for cinematic effects; (2) optimizing the compressed model into a 4-step generator via a combination of diffusion distillation and reinforcement learning; (3) employing a hybrid post-training quantization strategy to compress the model footprint to under 1 GB. Experimental results show that compared to the teacher model with the Wan 2.1 architecture, CineMobile achieves a 40x speedup in generation while maintaining comparable visual quality. Specifically, CineMobile generates 49-frame 480p videos with a per-step denoising latency of 0.6s on an NVIDIA H200 GPU and 20s on the MediaTek Dimensity 8400 Ultimate 5G platform, with a peak memory usage of 1.8 GB, demonstrating its practical applicability for mobile-based image-to-video creation.
2607.03803.abstract_zh: 移动设备上对图像转视频日益增长的需求，正日益聚焦于子弹时间（bullet time）、滑动变焦（dolly zoom）、慢动作等电影化运动效果。尽管扩散变换器（Diffusion Transformers, DiTs）在视频生成中表现出强大性能，但其参数量庞大且需多步迭代去噪，导致计算开销巨大，难以在移动设备上实现高效生成。我们提出CineMobile以弥合这一差距。具体而言，CineMobile采用三重优化策略：（1）利用蒸馏引导的剪枝方法，构建一个紧凑高效且保留电影效果所需核心视频生成能力的模型；（2）通过扩散蒸馏与强化学习的结合，将压缩模型优化为仅需4步的生成器；（3）采用混合训练后量化策略，将模型体积压缩至1GB以下。实验结果表明，与采用Wan 2.1架构的教师模型相比，CineMobile在保持相近视觉质量的同时，生成速度提升了40倍。具体而言，在NVIDIA H200 GPU上，CineMobile生成49帧480p视频的单步去噪延迟为0.6秒，在联发科天玑8400 Ultra 5G平台上为20秒，峰值内存使用量为1.8GB，这证明了其在移动端图像转视频创作中的实际适用性。

2607.08763.title: OpenCoF: Learning to Reason Through Video Generation
2607.08763.abstract: Reasoning has become a core capability for large models, especially when reliable decisions require understanding logical consequences. Recent video generation models offer a reasoning path distinct from previous Chain-of-Thought (CoT): reasoning can unfold through temporally connected frames, known as Chain-of-Frame (CoF) reasoning. However, existing video generators are primarily trained on general video corpora, still lacking diverse supervision and dedicated designs for CoF reasoning. To address this gap, we introduce OpenCoF, a framework comprising the OpenCoF-17K dataset, a reasoning video dataset spanning 11 task families, and Wan-CoF, a fine-tuned video model for studying whether diverse temporal supervision improves CoF behavior. Across four video reasoning benchmarks, Wan-CoF achieves considerable gains over the Wan2.2-I2V-A14B baseline. Building on this, we empirically explore more advanced designs for CoF capabilities, i.e., equipping the model with visual and textual reasoning tokens. This mechanism respectively captures low-level visual cues and high-level semantic priors for spatial and temporal reasoning. Through performance comparisons and attention analysis, we examine how these tokens contribute across model depth, denoising steps, space, and time. Our results suggest that stronger video reasoning requires both broad temporal supervision and explicit mechanisms for organizing intermediate reasoning state. We open-source the dataset, model, and code to facilitate future research on reasoning-oriented video generation.
2607.08763.abstract_zh: 推理已成为大型模型的核心能力，尤其在需要理解逻辑结果以作出可靠决策的场景中。近期视频生成模型提供了一条不同于以往思维链（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）的推理路径：推理可通过时间上连续的帧序列展开，即帧链（Chain-of-Frame, CoF）推理。然而，现有视频生成器主要在通用视频语料上训练，仍缺乏针对CoF推理的多样化监督信号与专用设计。为弥补这一空白，我们提出OpenCoF框架，包含覆盖11类任务家族的OpenCoF-17K视频推理数据集，以及Wan-CoF——一个用于研究多样化时序监督是否改善CoF行为的微调视频模型。在四项视频推理基准测试中，Wan-CoF相较Wan2.2-I2V-A14B基线模型取得显著提升。基于此，我们通过实证探索了提升CoF能力的进阶设计，即为模型配备视觉与文本推理标记（reasoning tokens）。该机制分别通过低层级视觉线索和高层级语义先验支持空间与时序推理。通过性能比较与注意力分析，我们考察了这些标记如何沿模型深度、去噪步骤、空间与时间维度发挥作用。研究结果表明，更强的视频推理能力既需要广泛的时序监督，也需要显式机制来组织中间推理状态。我们开源数据集、模型及代码，以推动面向推理的视频生成研究。

2607.07740.title: Jet-Long: Efficient Long-Context Extension with Dynamic Bifocal RoPE
2607.07740.abstract: Modern LLMs are increasingly deployed in long-context applications such as retrieval-augmented generation, repository-level coding, and agentic workflows whose accumulated reasoning and tool traces routinely push the input an order of magnitude past the pretraining window, making zero-shot context extension the dominant deployment path for open-weight checkpoints. Most existing zero-shot methods fix a single rescaling factor up front, so an aggressive factor sacrifices short-context fidelity while a conservative one breaks down at long contexts. We propose Jet-Long, a tuning-free zero-shot method that pairs a local RoPE-faithful window with a long-range window whose rescaling factor adapts dynamically to the current sequence length, recovering the base model exactly at short inputs while extrapolating cleanly at long ones. An inclusion-exclusion attention merge and an on-the-fly RoPE correction rotation make the bifocal construction essentially free at inference; fused into a single CuTe kernel, long-context prefill reaches up to $1.39\times$ FA2 throughput on H100 (approaching the Hopper-only FA4), and single-batch generation incurs $\le 4\%$ overhead at every length. On Qwen3-1.7B/4B/8B up to 128K context, Jet-Long leads RULER by $+4.79$/$+2.18$/$+2.03$~pp over the strongest baseline at 1.7B/4B/8B, achieves the best overall accuracy on HELMET-RAG (a benchmark identified by HELMET as the most efficient predictor of downstream long-context performance) and attains the lowest PG-19 perplexity. Jet-Long also generalizes to hybrid attention architectures such as Jet-Nemotron for further long-context improvement without retraining, and remains hyperparameter-resilient for ease of deployment.
2607.07740.abstract_zh: 现代大语言模型日益广泛地应用于长上下文场景，例如检索增强生成、仓库级代码编程以及智能体工作流。这些场景中累积的推理过程与工具调用轨迹，常常将输入长度推至超出预训练窗口一个数量级，使得零样本上下文扩展成为开放权重模型的主流部署路径。现有零样本方法大多预先固定单一缩放因子，导致激进因子会损害短上下文保真度，而保守因子则会在长上下文场景下失效。我们提出Jet-Long方法，这是一种无需调优的零样本方案，通过将局部RoPE保真窗口与长程窗口相结合，使后者的缩放因子能根据当前序列长度动态调整，从而在短输入时精确还原基础模型，在长输入时实现清晰外推。基于容斥原理的注意力融合机制与即时RoPE校正旋转，使得这种双焦点架构在推理时几乎无额外开销；通过融合至单一CuTe内核，长上下文预填充在H100上的吞吐量可达FA2的1.39倍（接近仅限Hopper架构的FA4），且单批次生成在任何长度下的额外开销均≤4%。在Qwen3-1.7B/4B/8B模型上进行的128K上下文测试中，Jet-Long在1.7B/4B/8B级别的最强基线基础上，将RULER指标分别提升了+4.79/+2.18/+2.03个百分点，在HELMET-RAG（被HELMET评估体系认定为最能有效预测下游长上下文性能的基准）上取得最佳综合准确率，并实现了最低的PG-19困惑度。Jet-Long还可泛化至混合注意力架构（如Jet-Nemotron），无需重新训练即可实现长上下文性能的进一步提升，且具备超参数鲁棒性以简化部署流程。

2607.07953.title: Linear Attention Architectures: Mechanisms, Trade-offs, and Cross-Layer Routing
2607.07953.abstract: Self-attention lets each token retrieve information from the full context, but its quadratic cost in sequence length limits training and inference at long context. This paper presents a comparative study of softmax attention and four recent recurrent linear-attention architectures: DeltaNet, Gated DeltaNet, Kimi Delta Attention, and Gated DeltaNet-2. We express these mechanisms in a common recurrent-memory notation, making explicit how they differ in expressivity, memory decay, erase and write control, training throughput, and implementation complexity. Our experiments center on 350M-parameter models trained for 15B tokens, and include optimizer and learning-rate comparisons, hybrid-versus-pure stack comparisons, sequence-length runtime measurements, larger DeltaNet runs at 1.3B and 3B parameters, and a small set of downstream evaluations. The reported speed results measure training throughput and iteration time; we do not provide an empirical inference-speed benchmark. Within the reported 350M-parameter, 15B-token sweep, Kimi Delta Attention with Muon reaches the lowest final validation loss, a pure Gated DeltaNet stack trained with AdamW has the highest normalized training throughput, hybrid stacks generally improve loss at a throughput cost, and Muon consistently lowers final validation loss relative to AdamW in the matched architecture settings we evaluate. We introduce and evaluate lightweight cross-layer routing mechanisms for DeltaNet-style memories. The most natural DeltaNet-inspired formulation, forwarding a lower layer's delta-rule write error into the next layer's value target, does not improve over matched baselines. Routing into the aligned hidden stream and forwarding the write value instead yields a modest improvement in the matched runs we report: Cross-Layer Value Routing (CLVR) lowers final validation loss for both DeltaNet and Gated DeltaNet.
2607.07953.abstract_zh: 自注意力机制允许每个标记从完整上下文中检索信息，但其随序列长度呈二次方增长的计算成本限制了长上下文场景下的训练与推理。本文对softmax注意力与四种近期提出的循环线性注意力架构进行了比较研究：DeltaNet、门控DeltaNet、Kimi Delta注意力及门控DeltaNet-2。我们采用统一的循环记忆表示框架描述这些机制，明确揭示了它们在表达能力、记忆衰减、擦除与写入控制、训练吞吐量以及实现复杂度方面的差异。实验以训练15B标记的3.5亿参数模型为核心，涵盖优化器与学习率比较、混合架构与纯架构对比、序列长度运行时测量、1.3B与3B参数规模的DeltaNet扩展实验，以及少量下游任务评估。报告的速度结果主要衡量训练吞吐量与迭代时间，未提供经验性的推理速度基准测试。在已报告的3.5亿参数/15B标记实验范围内，采用Muon优化器的Kimi Delta注意力获得了最低的最终验证损失，使用AdamW训练的纯门控DeltaNet架构实现了最高的归一化训练吞吐量，混合架构通常以牺牲吞吐量为代价改善损失表现，而在我们评估的匹配架构设置中，Muon相较于AdamW持续降低了最终验证损失。我们提出并评估了适用于DeltaNet类记忆的轻量级跨层路由机制。最自然的DeltaNet衍生方案——将低层的delta规则写入误差传递至高层的值目标——在匹配的基线实验中未显现改进效果。而通过向对齐的隐藏流进行路由并转发写入值，在我们报告的匹配实验中取得了适度提升：跨层值路由机制（Cross-Layer Value Routing, CLVR）同时降低了DeltaNet与门控DeltaNet的最终验证损失。

2607.04461.title: Flash-BoN: Instant Drafts for Inference-Time Scaling in Diffusion Models
2607.04461.abstract: Inference-time scaling for text-to-image generation has progressed from simple Best-of-$N$ (BoN) sampling to guided search methods that verify and steer candidate trajectories at intermediate denoising steps. These approaches focus on when and how often to verify during denoising but largely treat the cost of generation itself as fixed. Moreover, the standard practice of comparing methods by number of function evaluations (NFEs) counts only denoising forward passes and ignores verifier overhead, which can distort efficiency rankings. We show that under wall-clock evaluation, simple BoN already matches or outperforms several guided search techniques, suggesting that compute is better spent on broader exploration than on repeated intermediate verification. This motivates Flash-BoN, which generates a large pool of inexpensive draft candidates by combining three complementary acceleration knobs: timestep truncation, layer skipping, and activation proxies into a single configuration optimized once per model. An efficient multi-stage verification procedure then identifies the most promising draft, which is refined at full quality. Across three benchmarks and three model scales, Flash-BoN consistently outperforms all baselines under fixed wall-clock budgets, with gains that grow at larger model scales (+8% AUC). We further show that our strategy combines well and improves existing orthogonal techniques such as reflection-based prompt optimization (+16% AUC). The gains correlate with increased candidate diversity, which also enables draft-guided selection to accelerate RL post-training convergence.
2607.04461.abstract_zh: 文本到图像生成领域的推理时缩放技术已从简单的**最佳N采样**方法发展为包含验证与引导中间去噪轨迹的导向搜索方法。这些研究聚焦于验证时机与频率的优化，却普遍将生成过程本身的成本视为固定常量。当前方法论比较通常采用函数评估次数作为衡量标准，但该指标仅统计去噪前向传播过程，忽略了验证器产生的额外开销，可能导致效率评估失真。研究表明，在实际耗时评估框架下，简单的最佳N采样方法已达到甚至超越多种导向搜索技术的性能，这表明计算资源更适宜用于扩大探索范围而非重复的中间验证过程。基于此我们提出**Flash-BoN**方法：通过整合时间步截断、层级跳过和激活代理三项互补加速机制，构建出针对每个模型一次性优化的配置方案，从而生成大规模低成本候选草案池。随后通过高效多阶段验证流程筛选最优草案，并进行全质量精修。在三个基准测试和三种模型规模上的实验表明，在固定耗时预算下，Flash-BoN始终优于所有基线方法，且增益效果随模型规模扩大而增强。我们进一步证明该策略能与现有正交技术有效结合，例如基于反思的提示优化方法。性能提升与候选多样性的增加密切相关，这种多样性同时使草案引导选择能够加速强化学习后训练阶段的收敛过程。

2607.08526.title: A Quantized Native Runtime for On-Device Semantic Audio Generation
2607.08526.abstract: Semantic audio applications increasingly require controllable generation on commodity and embedded hardware rather than through framework-heavy datacenter stacks. We present \textit{aria}, a dependency-free native runtime that runs the complete text-to-music pipeline of Stable Audio~3 (SA3) on ordinary GPUs, CPU-only machines, and a Raspberry~Pi~5, with no Python or deep-learning framework underneath. Our main contribution is a study of quantization: running the model at lower numerical precision to fit tight memory budgets, saving memory in place rather than adding to it. Because the runtime owns every internal tensor, it also exposes activation steering, a low-cost way to steer what the model generates. We judge the quality cost with three independent measures of the output (prompt adherence, overall audio quality, taste preservation), each compared against the ordinary variation between random seeds. Eight-bit precision shows no measurable quality loss on any measure while sharply cutting memory, and it is the fastest mode on the GPU; four-bit adds a small, bounded cost but shrinks the footprint enough to run the $1.2$-billion-parameter model on an $8$\,GB Pi. Against the official implementation, aria matches or exceeds generation speed and starts about seven times faster. A case study of the steering interface generates music carrying taste associations (\emph{sonic seasoning}), with genuine but bounded control for a subset of attributes. These results make a compact, quantized runtime with built-in control a practical basis for on-device semantic audio in Internet-of-Sounds settings. The \textit{aria} runtime is released atthis https URL.
2607.08526.abstract_zh: 随着语义音频应用日益需要在商用及嵌入式硬件上进行可控生成，而非依赖架构繁重的数据中心堆栈，我们推出了\textit{aria}——一个无依赖的原生运行时，能够在普通GPU、纯CPU设备以及树莓派5（Raspberry Pi 5）上完整运行Stable Audio 3（SA3）的文本到音乐生成流程，且无需底层Python或深度学习框架支持。我们的核心贡献是对量化技术的研究：通过以较低数值精度运行模型以适应严格的内存限制，实现内存的就地节省而非额外占用。由于该运行时完全掌控所有内部张量，它还支持激活导向——一种低成本引导模型生成内容的方法。我们通过三项独立指标（提示词贴合度、整体音频质量、风格保持度）评估生成质量损失，每项均与随机种子间的常规变异进行对比。八位精度在显著降低内存占用的同时，在所有指标上均未显示可测量的质量损失，且在GPU上为最快运行模式；四位精度虽带来有限可控的质量损失，但足以将拥有12亿参数的模型压缩至可在8GB内存的树莓派上运行。与官方实现相比，aria在生成速度上持平或更优，且启动速度提升约七倍。通过操控界面的案例研究，我们生成了承载风味联想的音乐（\emph{声学调味}），实现了对部分属性的真实而有限的控制。这些成果表明，内置控制功能的紧凑型量化运行时，为物联网音频场景下的设备端语义音频处理提供了实用基础。\textit{aria}运行时已发布于https://github.com/microsoft/aria。

2607.08404.title: DrugGen 2: A disease-aware language model for enhancing drug discovery
2607.08404.abstract: Current computational approaches for drug design typically focus on generating molecules conditioned on specific targets or general molecular properties, often neglecting the influence of disease context on target behavior and therapeutic outcomes. To address this gap, we introduce DrugGen-2, a novel generative model that designs small molecules conditioned on both disease ontology and target protein sequences. DrugGen-2 was developed by fine-tuning a pre-trained GPT-2 model on a curated dataset of approved drugs linked to their diseases and targets, using a two-step strategy of supervised fine-tuning followed by reinforcement learning via group relative policy optimization (GRPO). This process was guided by reward functions optimizing for chemical validity, novelty, diversity, and high predicted binding affinity. When evaluated on five protein targets relevant to diabetic nephropathy, DrugGen-2 significantly outperformed baseline models (DrugGPT and DrugGen). It demonstrated a superior capacity to generate unique molecules, exhibited greater structural similarity to approved drugs, and achieved improved predicted binding affinities across all targets. Molecular docking analyses further supported these findings, identifying candidate ligands with strong binding potential, including compounds with predicted affinities (-9.917, -9.485, and -9.367) exceeding those of reference drugs such as enalapril for angiotensin-converting enzyme (-8.283). By integrating disease-specific context into molecular generation, DrugGen-2 advances AI-assisted drug discovery, offering a powerful tool for de novo design and drug repurposing that accounts for the complex interplay between diseases and molecular targets.
2607.08404.abstract_zh: 现有药物设计计算方法通常聚焦于针对特定靶点或一般分子属性生成分子，往往忽视了疾病背景对靶点行为及治疗结果的影响。为填补这一空白，我们提出了DrugGen-2——一种基于疾病本体论和靶点蛋白质序列生成小分子的新型生成模型。该模型通过对经过筛选的已批准药物数据集进行微调而开发，这些数据均关联其对应疾病与靶点；我们采用监督微调与基于组相对策略优化（GRPO）的强化学习两步策略，在预训练的GPT-2模型基础上进行优化。这一过程以优化化学有效性、新颖性、多样性及高预测结合亲和力为目标的奖励函数作为指导。在对糖尿病肾病相关的五个蛋白质靶点进行评估时，DrugGen-2显著超越了基线模型（DrugGPT和DrugGen），展现出生成独特分子的卓越能力，与已批准药物具有更高的结构相似性，并在所有靶点上实现了更优的预测结合亲和力。分子对接分析进一步支持了这些发现，鉴定出具有强结合潜力的候选配体，其中部分化合物的预测亲和力（-9.917、-9.485和-9.367）超越了如血管紧张素转换酶（ACE）抑制剂依那普利（-8.283）等参照药物。通过将疾病特异性背景整合到分子生成过程中，DrugGen-2推动了人工智能辅助药物发现的发展，为兼顾疾病与分子靶点间复杂相互作用的全新设计与药物重定位提供了强大工具。

2607.06987.title: UP: Unbounded Positive Asymmetric Optimization for Breaking the Exploration-Stability Dilemma
2607.06987.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become the standard paradigm for enhancing the complex reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). To achieve sample efficiency, modern RL frameworks rely on importance sampling (IS). However, these algorithms suffer from an exploration-stability dilemma. Pure IS often leads to catastrophic training instability, while standard clipping mechanisms used to mitigate this instability strictly constrain the policy update budget. By formalizing the concept of Probability Capacity (Cap), we reveal that conservative clipping structurally stifles exploration by prematurely truncating the update budget for correct but low-confidence reasoning paths. To break free from these constraints, we propose Unbounded Positive Asymmetric Optimization (UP), a universal and plug-and-play objective. UP theoretically restructures the optimization process by anchoring the policy to its current state via the stop-gradient operator. This asymmetric design unleashes unclipped, stable gradients for positive advantages to maximize exploration, while maintaining standard clipping safeguards for negative advantages to prevent training instability. Furthermore, our formulation readily extends across different optimization granularities, including token-level (GRPO, DAPO) and sequence-level (GSPO) frameworks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UP enhances exploration capacity and achieves superior reasoning accuracy across diverse RL algorithms (DAPO, GSPO, and GRPO), model architectures (Dense, MoE, and vision-language), and training modalities (language and multimodal), validating UP as a truly universal plug-and-play enhancement for RL-based training.
2607.06987.abstract_zh: 强化学习（Reinforcement Learning，RL）已成为提升大语言模型（Large Language Models，LLMs）复杂推理能力的标准范式。为实现样本高效性，现代RL框架依赖于重要性采样（Importance Sampling，IS）。然而，这些算法面临着探索-稳定性困境：纯重要性采样常导致灾难性的训练失稳，而用于缓解此问题的标准截断机制则严格限制了策略更新的空间。通过形式化概率容量（Probability Capacity，Cap）的概念，我们发现保守的截断机制会因过早地截断正确但低置信度推理路径的更新空间，从而在结构上抑制了探索。为突破这些限制，我们提出了无界正不对称优化（Unbounded Positive Asymmetric Optimization，UP），这是一种通用即插即用的优化目标。UP通过停止梯度算子将策略锚定于当前状态，从理论上重构了优化过程。这种不对称设计释放了未经截断的稳定梯度以最大化正向优势的探索，同时对负向优势保持标准截断保护以防止训练失稳。此外，我们的方法可轻松扩展到不同优化粒度，包括词元级（GRPO、DAPO）和序列级（GSPO）框架。大量实验表明，UP能够增强探索能力，并在多种RL算法（DAPO、GSPO及GRPO）、模型架构（密集模型、混合专家模型及视觉语言模型）和训练模态（语言与多模态）中取得更优的推理准确率，从而验证了UP作为一种真正通用的即插即用增强技术对基于RL的训练具有普适提升效果。

2607.06238.title: PhyMRI-SR: Toward Physics-Aware MRI Image Super-Resolution
2607.06238.abstract: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) super-resolution is vital for improving diagnostic accessibility, yet most methods treat it as a deterministic mapping from a fixed low-resolution input to a high-resolution target. This overlooks a key property of MRI acquisition physics: spatial resolution and signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) are inherently coupled, making any given low-resolution scan merely one of many possible realizations under varying acquisition trade-offs. We rethink MRI super-resolution as a physics-aware reconstruction problem, in which the goal is to identify the optimal resolution-SNR configuration and then super-resolve it to obtain high-quality MRI results. A key implication of this formulation is that MRI resolution becomes dynamic rather than fixed. To handle such resolution-heterogeneous inputs, we adapt 2D Gaussian Splatting (2D GS) to MRI by formulating reconstruction as a coordinate-based, resolution-agnostic rendering problem. To further enhance fidelity, we introduce three innovations: (1) a prior-aware Gaussian representation that combines an Anatomical Structure Prior for tissue-specific kernel initialization with an Imaging System Prior that captures hardware characteristics via a covariance dictionary; (2) a physics-constrained signal modeling scheme that predicts intrinsic tissue parameters (proton density rho and effective relaxation rate R2) and synthesizes intensities through governing physical equations, ensuring biophysically plausible contrast; and (3) a meta-learning framework that alleviates paired-data scarcity by pretraining on simulated data and adapting to real-world conditions. Extensive experiments on dynamic-resolution datasets and standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, highlighting its strong potential for clinical deployment.
2607.06238.abstract_zh: 磁共振成像（MRI）超分辨率对于提升诊断可及性至关重要，然而现有方法大多将其视为从固定低分辨率输入到高分辨率目标的确定性映射。这种做法忽略了MRI采集物理学的一个关键特性：空间分辨率与信噪比（SNR）本质上是相互耦合的，使得任何给定的低分辨率扫描仅是不同采集权衡条件下众多可能实现形式中的一种。我们重新将MRI超分辨率构想为一个物理感知的重建问题，其目标在于确定最优的分辨率-SNR配置，进而通过超分辨率处理获得高质量的MRI结果。这一框架的核心启示在于：MRI分辨率成为动态可变的而非固定参数。为处理此类分辨率异构的输入数据，我们通过将重建问题表述为基于坐标的、分辨率无关的渲染任务，将二维高斯泼溅（2D GS）技术适配至MRI领域。为进一步提升重建保真度，我们引入了三项创新：（1）先验感知的高斯表示法，该方法结合了面向组织特异性核初始化的解剖结构先验（Anatomical Structure Prior）以及通过协方差字典捕捉硬件特性的成像系统先验（Imaging System Prior）；（2）物理约束的信号建模方案，可预测本征组织参数（质子密度ρ与有效弛豫率R2）并通过控制物理方程合成强度信号，确保生成生物物理层面可信的对比度；（3）元学习框架，通过在模拟数据上预训练并适配真实场景条件，缓解配对数据稀缺问题。在动态分辨率数据集及标准基准测试上的大量实验表明，本方法实现了最先进的性能，凸显了其在临床部署方面的强大潜力。

2607.08093.title: CausalDS: Benchmarking Causal Reasoning in Data-Science Agents
2607.08093.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly act as integrated data-science agents, combining abstract reasoning with advanced tool use. Yet the relevant benchmark landscape largely divides into symbolic causal reasoning benchmarks without realistic data analysis or data analysis benchmarks without a principled causal data-generating structure. Furthermore, existing causal evaluation datasets are often restricted to curated examples from existing sources, with diversity coming from limited templatized variations rather than from systematic generation of novel synthetic causal structures. We introduce CausalDS, a benchmark for evaluating causal reasoning in agentic data-science workflows. Each benchmark instance is a scene consisting of a sampled structural causal model (SCM) with generated observational data and an accompanying synthetic natural-language story grounded in a realistic domain. We optionally ground the composition of the benchmark components in empirical distributions obtained from real-world datasets, thus retaining empirical structure while reducing the "causal parrot" risk through completely synthetic generation. From each scene, we then derive tasks spanning all three of Pearl's rungs, with typical data-science prediction tasks appearing as Rung 1. Most tasks include a data science coding component, where the model typically needs to use several tools to arrive at the final answer due to the frequent presence of imperfect observations, which are generated by an observation model. Additionally, recognizing when a question admits no warranted answer and abstaining is treated as a first-class scored outcome. The benchmark thus jointly evaluates symbolic causal reasoning, data science, uncertainty quantification, abstention, and tool use/coding.
2607.08093.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）正日益成为集成化的数据科学智能体，将抽象推理与高级工具使用能力相结合。然而，现有基准测试体系主要割裂为两类：一类是缺乏真实数据分析的符号化因果推理基准，另一类则是缺少原则性因果数据生成结构的数据分析基准。此外，现有的因果评估数据集通常局限于从现有来源选取的整理示例，其多样性仅来自有限的模板化变体，而非通过对新颖合成因果结构的系统化生成。为此，我们提出了CausalDS——一个用于评估智能体化数据科学工作流中因果推理能力的基准。每个基准实例构成一个情境，包含一个抽样的结构因果模型（SCM，Structural Causal Model）及其生成的观测数据，并辅以一个基于现实领域构建的合成自然语言叙述。我们可选择将基准组件的构成锚定于从真实世界数据集中获取的经验分布，从而在保持经验结构的同时，通过完全合成生成降低“因果鹦鹉”风险。针对每个情境，我们设计出涵盖珀尔因果阶梯全部三个层级的任务，其中典型的数据科学预测任务对应第一层级（Rung 1）。多数任务包含数据科学编程环节：由于观测模型常生成不完美观测数据，模型通常需要运用多种工具才能得出最终答案。此外，该基准将“识别问题是否缺乏可靠答案并主动弃答”视为首要评分结果。由此，该基准实现了对符号因果推理、数据科学、不确定性量化、弃答机制以及工具使用/编程能力的联合评估。

2607.08741.title: ARDY: Autoregressive Diffusion with Hybrid Representation for Interactive Human Motion Generation
2607.08741.abstract: Generating realistic 3D human motions in real-time within interactive applications is key for animation, simulation, and humanoid robotics. While recent offline motion generation approaches offer precise control via text and kinematic constraints, they lack the inference speed required for interactive settings. Conversely, existing online methods enable real-time synthesis but often sacrifice controllability or struggle with complex text semantics and long-horizon goals due to limited context windows. In this work, we introduce ARDY, a streaming generation framework that bridges this gap by enabling high-fidelity motion generation controllable via online text prompts and flexible kinematic constraints. ARDY employs a hybrid representation that combines explicit root features with a latent body embedding, balancing precise trajectory control with efficient generative learning. We propose a two-stage autoregressive transformer denoiser that features variable history context and supports conditioning on flexible, long-horizon kinematic constraints. By training on a large-scale motion capture dataset and being directly conditioned on text labels and kinematic constraints sampled from ground truth poses, ARDY natively learns controllable generation that supports online prompting and flexible long-horizon goals. Extensive evaluations on the HumanML3D benchmark and the large-scale, high-fidelity Bones Rigplay dataset demonstrate ARDY's high motion quality and constraint adherence, validating the efficacy of our key architectural decisions. Finally, we demonstrate the method's practical versatility through an interactive demo featuring dynamic text control, diverse keyframe pose constraints, path following, and interactive locomotion control via mouse and keyboard. Supplementary video results, code, and model releases can be found atthis https URL.
2607.08741.abstract_zh: 在交互式应用中实时生成逼真的三维人体运动，是动画、仿真与人形机器人领域的关键技术。当前，离线的运动生成方法虽能通过文本和运动学约束实现精确控制，但其推理速度无法满足交互场景的需求。反之，现有的在线方法虽能实现实时合成，却常因有限的上下文窗口而牺牲了可控性，或在处理复杂文本语义与长时程目标时表现欠佳。本文提出ARDY，一个流式生成框架，旨在弥合这一鸿沟，实现可通过在线文本提示与灵活运动学约束控制的高保真运动生成。ARDY采用了一种混合表征方式，将显式的根节点特征与潜在的身体嵌入相结合，在精确轨迹控制与高效生成学习之间取得平衡。我们设计了一个两阶段自回归变换器去噪器，其具备可变历史上下文特征，并支持对灵活、长时程的运动学约束进行条件建模。通过在大规模运动捕捉数据集上训练，并直接以从真实姿势采样的文本标签和运动学约束为条件，ARDY能够原生学习支持在线提示与灵活长时程目标的可控生成。在HumanML3D基准测试以及大规模、高保真的Bones Rigplay数据集上的广泛评估表明，ARDY具备优异的运动质量与约束遵循能力，验证了我们核心架构设计的有效性。最后，我们通过一个交互式演示展示了该方法的实际多功能性，包括动态文本控制、多样化关键帧姿势约束、路径跟随以及通过鼠标键盘实现的交互式运动控制。补充视频结果、代码及模型发布可访问此链接：https:// 。

2607.07816.title: A Sparse and Truncated State Vector Simulator for Peaked Circuits
2607.07816.abstract: In a class of quantum circuits known as peaked circuits, the goal is to predict the most probable bit string at the output of the circuit. Since these circuits are designed to have a sharp peak in their output distribution, in principle it should be possible to simulate them using a truncated state vector with a limited number of terms, or a fraction of the total probability mass. This approximate simulation can be carried out on a classical computer with a sparse representation that stores only the nonzero amplitudes of the state vector, in contrast to the dense representations that are common in most quantum simulators. For efficiency, all operations on the state vector should be vectorized to the furthest possible extent and, if available, hardware acceleration can also be used. This work describes how these requirements were met in an open-source implementation, and discusses its performance and limitations.
2607.07816.abstract_zh: 在一类被称为峰值电路(peaked circuits)的量子电路中，其目标在于预测电路输出端出现概率最高的比特串。由于这类电路被设计为在其输出分布中具有尖锐的峰值，原则上应能通过使用有限项数的截断态向量，或总概率质量的一部分来模拟这些电路。与大多数量子模拟器中常见的密集表示方式不同，这种近似模拟可在经典计算机上通过稀疏表示实现——仅存储态向量的非零振幅。为提高效率，所有对态向量的操作应在最大程度上实现向量化，并在条件允许时利用硬件加速。本研究阐述了如何在开源实现中满足这些要求，并讨论了其性能与局限性。

2607.03936.title: Can Dialects Be Steered Like Languages? Sparse Neurons and Distributed Directions in Arabic LLMs
2607.03936.abstract: A key challenge in Arabic NLP is the scarcity of dialectal data relative to Modern Standard Arabic (MSA), causing LLMs to overproduce MSA and struggle with dialectally accurate generation. From an interpretability perspective, this raises a fundamental question: where and how are dialectal features encoded within model internals, and can these representations be leveraged to improve dialect generation without fine-tuning? This study investigates two complementary inference-time approaches that serve simultaneously as interpretability probes and control mechanisms. First, we conduct a neuron-level analysis, identifying sparse neuron populations that encode dialect-specific features and showing that amplifying or suppressing these neurons can steer model outputs toward target dialects. Second, motivated by the entanglement of dialectal features at the single-neuron level, we apply a vector-steering approach that extracts dialect-specific activation directions and injects them during inference. Together, these methods illuminate the geometry of dialectal knowledge in Arabic LLMs and offer a principled, interpretability-grounded framework for dialect control without requiring dialect-specific fine-tuning.
2607.03936.abstract_zh: 阿拉伯自然语言处理（NLP）的一个关键挑战是方言数据相对于现代标准阿拉伯语（Modern Standard Arabic, MSA）的稀缺性，这导致大语言模型（LLMs）过度生成MSA内容，并在生成符合方言特征的文本时面临困难。从可解释性的角度来看，这引出了一个根本性问题：方言特征在模型内部的何处以及如何被编码？能否在不进行微调的情况下，利用这些表征来提升方言生成能力？本研究探讨了两种互补的推理时方法，它们同时作为可解释性探针和控制机制。首先，我们进行了神经元层面的分析，识别出编码方言特定特征的稀疏神经元群，并证明通过增强或抑制这些神经元，可以引导模型输出向目标方言转变。其次，受单神经元层面方言特征纠缠现象的启发，我们采用了一种向量导向方法，该方法提取方言特定的激活方向，并在推理过程中将其注入。这些方法共同揭示了阿拉伯语大语言模型中方言知识的几何结构，并提供了一个基于原理、以可解释性为依据的方言控制框架，无需进行方言特定的微调。

2607.03118.short_zh: 实时交互式语音控制视频生成
2607.03118.tags: 计算机图形学;视频生成;实时交互式视频生成模型
2607.03118.body_summary:
本文介绍了Vidu S1，一个支持语音控制、能生成实时交互式视频的模型。
该模型支持无限长度实时生成、内容可控，并能在普通消费级GPU上实现高速视频输出。

2601.16211.short_zh: 缓解目标捷径的零样本组合动作识别
2601.16211.tags: 计算机视觉;视频理解;零样本组合动作识别
2601.16211.body_summary:
零样本组合动作识别要求模型识别由已知动词和物体组合而成的新颖动作，但现有模型常依赖物体标签而非时序线索进行预测。
本文提出RCORE方法，通过正则化对抗共现先验和增强时序顺序敏感性，来缓解物体驱动的捷径学习，提升组合泛化能力。

2603.29616.short_zh: 重新审视视频理解评估方法
2603.29616.tags: 计算机视觉；视频理解；视频理解基准评估
2603.29616.body_summary:
现有视频理解基准存在大量无需视觉或时序信息的捷径样本，导致模型真实能力难以衡量。
本文提出诊断工具Video-Oasis，审计并过滤现有基准中的捷径样本，用提炼出的核心挑战测试模型，并探索提升视频理解的算法设计。

2607.08768.short_zh: 评测现实世界主动智能体
2607.08768.tags: 智能体系统;智能体评测;现实世界任务评测
2607.08768.body_summary:
现有评测方法难以有效评估能在现实世界环境中操作工具、辅助用户的主动智能体。
我们提出了首个能力驱动的基准UniClawBench，包含400个双语任务，并在动态环境中使用闭环策略评估了多款前沿模型与框架。

2607.08758.short_zh: 评估科学思想传承与生成
2607.08758.tags: 自然语言处理;科学文本处理;思想谱系推理与生成
2607.08758.body_summary:
当前AI在理解科学思想的传承结构方面缺乏评估基准。
我们提出了一个包含思想谱系推理测试与生成评估的基准，并发现现有系统存在推理瓶颈。

2607.08770.short_zh: 用事件相机生成高质量视频
2607.08770.tags: 计算机视觉;视频重建与生成;事件流视频合成
2607.08770.body_summary:
从稀疏事件流中恢复高质量视频，并实现预测和插帧是挑战。
提出LongE2V方法，利用视频扩散模型高效联合处理三项任务，并引入新机制提升长期稳定性和一致性。

2607.08765.short_zh: 增强上下文全景生成的两阶段框架
2607.08765.tags: 计算机视觉;图像生成;全景图像生成
2607.08765.body_summary:
缺乏针对上下文全景任务的大规模高质量训练数据。
构建百万级全景数据集，通过几何感知预训练和统一框架提升全景生成质量与多任务能力。

2607.03803.short_zh: 移动端图像转视频生成模型优化
2607.03803.tags: 计算机视觉;视频生成;移动端图像转视频
2607.03803.body_summary:
移动设备图像转视频生成需求增长，但现有扩散模型计算开销大，难以在移动端高效运行。
提出了CineMobile，通过剪枝、蒸馏与强化学习优化以及后训练量化，在移动端实现高质量、低延迟的图像转视频生成。

2607.08763.short_zh: 视频生成用于逻辑推理
2607.08763.tags: 计算机视觉；视频理解；视频推理生成
2607.08763.body_summary:
现有视频生成模型缺乏为逻辑推理设计的监督训练和专门架构。
我们提出了包含数据集和模型的新框架，通过引入时间和语义标记提升了视频推理能力。

2607.07740.short_zh: 高效扩展长上下文的无调优方法
2607.07740.tags: 自然语言处理;大语言模型;长上下文推理
2607.07740.body_summary:
现代大语言模型越来越多地应用于需要处理长输入序列的场景，但零样本上下文扩展方法通常存在短上下文保真度与长上下文有效性难以兼顾的问题。
本文提出了一种无需微调的零样本方法Jet-Long，它通过动态调整的长短双窗口设计和高效的注意力融合机制，在保持短上下文性能的同时，有效扩展了模型的上下文处理能力。

2607.07953.short_zh: 比较线性注意力机制优劣
2607.07953.tags: 自然语言处理;序列建模;注意力机制
2607.07953.body_summary:
自注意力机制在长上下文场景中因二次计算成本而受限，本文对多种线性注意力架构进行了比较研究。
通过统一框架分析不同架构特性，并在多个规模模型上实验，评估了训练效率与性能，还提出并测试了跨层路由方法。

2607.04461.short_zh: 快速生成多样候选图择优细化
2607.04461.tags: 计算机图形学;图像生成;扩散模型推理加速
2607.04461.body_summary:
背景/任务：在扩散模型推理阶段，现有提升质量的方法往往忽视生成本身的计算成本，且常用评估指标（NFEs）未能反映真实耗时。
做了什么：提出Flash-BoN方法，通过结合截断、跳层和激活代理三种加速技术一次性生成大量廉价草图，再经高效验证挑选最佳草图进行全质量精修，在固定耗时下超越现有方法。

2607.08526.short_zh: 端侧语义音频的量化原生运行时
2607.08526.tags: 音频生成;模型部署与推理;量化运行时
2607.08526.body_summary:
语义音频应用日益需要在普通硬件而非数据中心上实现可控生成。
我们提出aria，一个依赖极少的原生运行时，能在CPU、普通GPU和树莓派5上完整运行SA3，并通过量化大幅降低内存，速度快且支持激活引导控制。

2607.08404.short_zh: 疾病感知药物生成模型
2607.08404.tags: 药学信息学;药物设计;疾病感知分子生成
2607.08404.body_summary:
现有药物设计方法常忽略疾病背景对靶点行为的影响，无法生成针对特定疾病背景的分子。
本文提出DrugGen-2模型，结合疾病本体和靶点序列生成小分子，并通过优化策略提升分子多样性和结合亲和力，在糖尿病肾病靶点上验证了其优势。

2607.06987.short_zh: 用正不对称优化破解强化学习探索困境
2607.06987.tags: 强化学习;语言模型强化学习;策略优化稳定性
2607.06987.body_summary:
强化学习用于提升大语言模型复杂推理能力，但现有方法面临探索与稳定性难以兼顾的困境。
提出一种通用的无界正不对称优化方法，通过非对称梯度设计放开正向优势更新以促进探索，同时保持负向优势的裁剪以保证稳定，从而提升多种强化学习框架的性能。

2607.06238.short_zh: 用高斯泼溅实现物理感知的MRI超分辨率
2607.06238.tags: 医学图像处理;医学图像重建;磁共振成像超分辨率
2607.06238.body_summary:
现有MRI超分辨率方法忽略成像物理中分辨率与信噪比的耦合关系，将超分辨率视为固定输入到输出的确定性映射。
我们将其重构为物理感知的逆问题，通过先验感知的高斯表示、物理约束的信号建模和元学习框架，实现动态分辨率的输入并合成高质量MRI图像。

2607.08093.short_zh: 构建因果数据科学智能体评测基准
2607.08093.tags: 机器学习;因果推断;智能体评测
2607.08093.body_summary:
现有评测基准难以全面评估集成式数据科学智能体的因果推理能力，缺少结合真实数据分析与结构化因果生成场景的综合性任务。
本文构建了一个名为CausalDS的基准，通过系统生成新颖的合成因果结构、观测数据和自然语言场景，并设计覆盖因果推理层级和典型数据科学任务的综合问题，以评估智能体的因果推理、数据分析、不确定性量化及工具使用等综合能力。

2607.08741.short_zh: 实时可控人体运动生成
2607.08741.tags: 计算机图形学;人体动画;交互式运动生成
2607.08741.body_summary:
需为动画、仿真和人形机器人等应用生成实时可控的3D人体运动，现有方法在速度与控制性上存在矛盾。
提出ARDY框架，使用混合表示和自回归变换器降噪器，实现通过在线文本和运动学约束进行高保真、长时程的交互式运动生成。

2607.07816.short_zh: 实现峰值电路的稀疏截断模拟器
2607.07816.tags: 量子计算;量子电路模拟;峰值电路模拟
2607.07816.body_summary:
量子计算中有一类峰值电路，其输出分布具有明显峰值
提出一种使用稀疏截断状态向量的近似模拟方法并用开源实现验证

2607.03936.short_zh: 阿拉伯方言在LLM中的控制机制
2607.03936.tags: 自然语言处理;预训练语言模型;阿拉伯语多方言生成
2607.03936.body_summary:
阿拉伯语NLP中方言数据稀缺，导致大模型倾向生成标准语而难以准确生成方言。
通过分析神经元和激活方向，提出无需微调的方言控制方法，揭示了方言知识在模型中的几何结构。
